name: Cube Guardian : Tower Defender
short_description: Cube Guardian: Tower Defender is a rogue-like tower defense game on a procedurally generated, cube-based battlefield. Protect the Nexus by strategically placing resource buildings as enemy waves intensify every 10 seconds. Earn XP to unlock upgrades and beat your high score!
detailed_description:
Cube Guardian: Tower Defender is a rogue-like tower defense game set on a procedurally generated, cube-based battlefield. Your mission is to protect the central Nexus by strategically placing buildings on multiple cube levels while managing your energy and money.

The placement of your defenses is crucial—each cube offers unique tactical advantages, and every decision matters as enemy waves become increasingly formidable. With each level-up, you choose from various upgrades to strengthen your existing defenses or unlock new options.

The challenge intensifies every 10 seconds, testing your strategy and quick reflexes. While defeat is inevitable, your goal is to push your limits and achieve the highest score possible.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Russian
